name: Internet Speed Test
description: Professional Internet Diagnostics Suite — download/upload speed, latency, jitter, packet loss, DNS timing, TLS handshake, HTTP response analysis, server performance timings, ISP quality assessment, connection quality scores, browser environment profiling, and individual diagnostic tools. Generates detailed reports with JSON/PDF/TXT/CSV export and terminal cURL output. Integrates with Network Toolkit for deep-dive analysis.
author: Shamrouz Awan

meta.title: Internet Speed Test — Professional Network Diagnostics Suite
meta.description: Test your internet speed with precision: download, upload, ping, jitter, packet loss, DNS timing, TLS handshake, HTTP response analysis, and connection quality scoring. Detailed reports with export.
